default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of GrowthX CMS for content publishing and management.](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CMS is user-friendly, simpler than WordPress, with straightforward content creation and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Image handling is efficient: easy upload, auto-resizing, and focal point selection](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [Category management requires backend work; discussion needed for topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [SEO considerations: custom slug creation is possible for keyword optimization](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

## Topics

### CMS Navigation and Basic Functions

  - [Access CMS via top menu: Insert \> Layout \> Text \> CMS](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - ['Block' section is primary area for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Creating new items auto-generates slugs; can be manually overridden](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Date selection, category assignment, and image upload with focal point feature](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Simple content editor with formatting options (headings, lists, images, quotes, videos)](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Draft/Published status visible; one-click publishing](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

### Content Structure and Formatting

  - [Title, intro text, and main content areas available](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [H2 recommended for main title, H3 for subheadings](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Easy insertion of images, bullet lists, and other media](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Alt text can be added to images for accessibility](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Image Handling

  - [Direct upload without separate database management](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Framer auto-resizes images for mobile/desktop](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Recommendation: keep images under 150KB for optimal performance](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Discussion planned for image sourcing (custom vs. generated)](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)

### Category Management

  - [Current limitations on adding new categories](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Plan to align categories with topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Backend work required for category updates and overview page](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)

### SEO and Page Settings

  - [Custom slug creation possible for keyword optimization](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Page settings allow for preview customization, code insertion, and description editing](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [Changes in page settings apply globally to all blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Discuss and finalize topic clusters for category creation](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Plan image strategy (custom vs. generated) in tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Frank to handle backend category updates as needed](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Team to start using CMS for content creation, reaching out via Slack for any assistance](https://fathom.video/share/w6V3S-CduLwyfqo73cJ4zjU8nFjy_f39?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
